# CWE-342 safe: Predictable Exact Value from Previous Values (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-342-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/binary"
	"net/http"
)

func AdvanceSmsCode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	var code uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &code); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE login_codes SET otp = ? WHERE email = ?", code, email)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
